title: Configuration
description: Object containing information about a control-plane's cloud-gateways configuration.

dataplane_group_config.description: Object that describes where data-planes will be deployed to, along with how many instances.
dataplane_group_config.title: Configuration Data-Plane Group Configs

dataplane_groups.description:
List of data-plane groups that describe where data-planes will be deployed to, along with how many
instances.

entity_version.description: Positive, monotonically increasing version integer, to serialize configuration changes.

created_at.description: An RFC-3339 timestamp representation of configuration creation date.

updated_at.description: An RFC-3339 timestamp representation of configuration update date.
